title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account despite resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the transaction keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer updated their billing address but the old address still appears on the invoice.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA verification codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives an upload failed error when trying to change profile picture.

title: Auto-Renewal Disabled
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal but the option is currently unavailable.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer completed payment but did not receive a confirmation email.

title: Seat Booking Not Reflected
description: Customer booked seats for an event but the booking does not appear in their account.

title: Coupon Code Not Working
description: Promo code shows as invalid even though it is within the valid date range.

title: Delayed SMS Notification
description: Customer reports receiving booking SMS notifications several hours late.

title: Account Suspension Without Notice
description: Customer account was suspended unexpectedly without prior warning.

title: Error While Applying Gift Card
description: System throws an error when customer tries to redeem a valid gift card.
